IBM X-Force 2026 Threat Intelligence Index (March 3 2026, so.html5.qq.com) corroborating with a THIRD independent vendor dataset (after CrowdStrike S-184 and Check Point W-203) that AI-driven attacks are escalating — THIRD-VENDOR-CORROBORATION-IBM-X-FORCE-2026 dimension; IBM flagged legacy unpatched infrastructure + AI-automated attacker tooling as the dominant 2026 pattern (THIRD-VENDOR-CORROBORATION-IBM-X-FORCE-2026) (S-190); mobile-vs-desktop Core Web Vitals differential (2026 independent-developer CWV guide, blog.csdn.net/web_geek May 20 2026) — sites scoring well on DESKTOP QA ROUTINELY FAIL on MOBILE because mobile networks/CPU/GPU are slower — MOBILE-VS-DESKTOP-CWV-DEGRADATION-DIFFERENTIAL-DIAGNOSTIC dimension distinct from P-054 (INP metric definition) and P-063 (200ms threshold) because G-158 is the DESKTOP-PASS-MOBILE-FAIL differential (MOBILE-VS-DESKTOP-CWV-DEGRADATION-DIFFERENTIAL-DIAGNOSTIC) (G-158); Lighthouse CI automated performance regression pre-merge gate (recommended in the 2026 CWV guide) — AUTOMATED-PERFORMANCE-REGRESSION-LIGHTHOUSE-CI-PRE-MERGE-GATE dimension distinct from P-039/P-063 (thresholds) because P-088 is the AUTOMATION/CI-GATE dimension (AUTOMATED-PERFORMANCE-REGRESSION-LIGHTHOUSE-CI-PRE-MERGE-GATE) (P-088); INP Long-Task 50ms ceiling root-cause diagnostic (blog.csdn.net/Vivien_pan INP guide Dec 26 2025) — canonical diagnostic identifies any main-thread task >50ms as the #1 INP killer — INP-LONG-TASK-50MS-CEILING-ROOT-CAUSE-DIAGNOSTIC dimension distinct from P-054 (metric) and P-063 (threshold) and G-158 (environmental) because B-134 is the CODE-LEVEL ROOT-CAUSE diagnostic identifying WHICH tasks degrade INP (INP-LONG-TASK-50MS-CEILING-ROOT-CAUSE-DIAGNOSTIC) (B-134); AI-native browser natural-language game discovery (Atlas + Safari Apple Intelligence + Chrome Skills, April-June 2026) — users increasingly ask their browser AI "find me a relaxing puzzle game" RATHER THAN typing into Google — NATURAL-LANGUAGE-GAME-DISCOVERY-VIA-AI-BROWSER-SEO-MENTION-OPTIMIZATION dimension shifting GameZipper SEO from keyword-matching to AI-LLM-mention optimization (NATURAL-LANGUAGE-GAME-DISCOVERY-VIA-AI-BROWSER-SEO-MENTION-OPTIMIZATION) (A-045).
**Version Note**: v1.97.0 = R216 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 8 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research (June 26 2026): Chrome 131+ Chromium `::selection` CSS inheritance BREAKING CHANGE (Nov 20 2024 finance.sina.com.cn, recurring into Chromium 149+ 2026 baseline) where element selection styling now inherits from the PARENT element instead of the element's own `::selection` rule, breaking text-highlight visual feedback on Tailwind-reset sites (players select game title/instructions but no visible highlight) — the BROWSER-CSS-SELECTION-INHERITANCE-BREAKAGE-CLASS dimension distinct from C-063 (CSS Gap Decorations — new feature) and C-072 (CSS Gap Decorations cross-browser rendering — feature parity) because B-137 is a REGRESSION in existing ::selection behavior (BROWSER-CSS-SELECTION-INHERITANCE-BREAKAGE-CLASS) (B-137); AMD 2026 H1 earnings-call memory-supply tightening warning (Lisa Su, Sohu May 6 2026) forecasting global memory/component cost pressure and a >=20% QoQ decline in game-hardware revenue (GPU+console) for H2 2026 — meaning the GameZipper player base skews TOWARD lower-RAM devices as new-device sales slow, requiring a low-available-RAM (<4GB) QA regression tier — the HARDWARE-COST-PRESSURE-DRIVES-LOW-RAM-DEVICE-FRAGMENTATION dimension distinct from P-059 (per-tab hard memory caps — browser limit) and P-071 (iOS RAM tier divide for AI features — AI workload) because P-091 is the MARKET-LEVEL cost-driven device-skew baseline shift (HARDWARE-COST-PRESSURE-DRIVES-LOW-RAM-DEVICE-FRAGMENTATION) (P-091); WebGL canvas auto-resize-on-window-resize class bug (github.com/Team766/2020Sim#25 pattern, recurring 2026 in foldable / multi-window / orientation-change contexts) where game canvas uses fixed pixel dimensions and does not respond to window/orientation/devicePixelRatio change — the WEBGL-CANVAS-RESPONSIVE-RESIZE-ON-VIEWPORT-CHANGE-CLASS dimension distinct from C-073 (foldable viewport resize — foldable-specific) and P-078 (LTPO variable refresh rate — refresh-rate not size) because G-160 is the CANVAS-DIMENSION-RESPONSIVENESS dimension (WEBGL-CANVAS-RESPONSIVE-RESIZE-ON-VIEWPORT-CHANGE-CLASS) (G-160); WebGL shader type-misuse compile-failure class (cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2548226 June 26 2026 — "error C1013: function main is already defined") where GL_VERTEX_SHADER is wrongly reused for fragment shader, producing a duplicate-main link error that fails SILENTLY in some GPU drivers but crashes in others — the WEBGL-SHADER-TYPE-MISUSE-SILENT-COMPILE-FAILURE-CLASS dimension distinct from S-085 (WebRTC UAF — different subsystem) and S-090 (Three.js WebGPU crash — different path) because S-195 targets the SHADER-CREATION-API-MISUSE class (WEBGL-SHADER-TYPE-MISUSE-SILENT-COMPILE-FAILURE-CLASS) (S-195); WebKit-7620.1.16.11.5 release tag (github.com/WebKit/WebKit Nov 13 2025) rolling into the Safari 27 stable baseline — recurring WebKit-specific tag that introduces rendering quirks (canvas/WebAudio/CSS) NOT present in Chromium — the WEBKIT-SPECIFIC-RELEASE-TAG-RENDERING-DRIFT-CLASS dimension distinct from B-059 (Safari 27 beta features — count) and B-090 (Safari 27 WWDC26 fixes — count) because C-140 is the SPECIFIC-RELEASE-TAG-DRIFT dimension (WEBKIT-SPECIFIC-RELEASE-TAG-RENDERING-DRIFT-CLASS) (C-140); Chrome/Edge "STATUS_INVALID_IMAGE_HASH" RendererCodeIntegrityEnabled registry-disable workaround class (blog.csdn.net/weixin_39802884/article/details/119460308 Aug 6 2021, recurring 2026) where users apply a registry edit to bypass renderer code-integrity protection, breaking some Canvas/WebGL extensions silently — the USER-SELF-INFLICTED-RENDERER-INTEGRITY-DISABLE-WORKAROUND-CLASS dimension, a SIBLING of B-136 (iOS experimental toggles) but on the Windows/Chromium side (USER-SELF-INFLICTED-RENDERER-INTEGRITY-DISABLE-WORKAROUND-CLASS) (W-209); 2026 cross-region multiplayer / cloud-download-failure user-complaint class (so.html5.qq.com "REPO下载失败" May 14 2026 + UU加速器 baseline April 17 2026) where download/connect failure is blamed on the game but is actually ISP/CDN-transit — the NETWORK-BLAMED-GAME-BUG-DIAGNOSTIC-DISAMBIGUATION dimension distinct from G-156 (cross-region reliability — quality) and W-187 (ISP DNS filtering — reach) because PC-020 is the USER-COMPLAINT-ATTRIBUTION dimension requiring clear diagnostic error messages + retry (NETWORK-BLAMED-GAME-BUG-DIAGNOSTIC-DISAMBIGUATION) (PC-020); 2026 long-text voice-clone audio-stability baseline shift (so.html5.qq.com June 10 2026 — 悄然声色 50万字 voice-clone 98% timbre similarity sustained) establishing the new PLAYER EXPECTATION that audio does NOT drift/crackle/pitch-shift over long sessions — directly relevant to GameZipper BGM/SFX 30+ minute loops — the LONG-SESSION-AUDIO-STABILITY-BASELINE-SHIFT dimension distinct from P-089 (WKWebView evaluateJS crash — native crash) and the BGM-cleanup pitfall (timer leak) because A-046 is the SUBJECTIVE-AUDIO-QUALITY-OVER-LONG-SESSIONS dimension, most impactful for hearing-impaired players with hearing aids (LONG-SESSION-AUDIO-STABILITY-BASELINE-SHIFT) (A-046).
**Version Note**: v1.98.0 = R217 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 7 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research (June 26 2026): TanStack "Mini Shai-Hulud" GitHub Actions cache-poisoning attack (May 12 2026, blog.csdn.net/weixin_42376192/article/details/161181175 May 18 2026) + June 26 2026 dead-man's-switch variant (cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2679559 JS Weekly #20) — a SINGLE malicious PR titled "fix: 优化vite构建速度" triggered pull_request_target CI, poisoned pnpm cache, exfiltrated npm OIDC publish token, and pushed 42 malicious packages / 84 versions in 6 MINUTES, ALL carrying VALID SLSA Level-3 build provenance that bypassed 95%+ of supply-chain security scanners; the June 26 variant adds a token-revocation-aware dead-man's-switch that wipes files if the token is revoked — the CI-CACHE-POISONING-WITH-VALID-SLSA-PROVENANCE-BYPASS dimension distinct from S-128 (ClawHub AI-agent marketplace — different vector: marketplace not CI cache) and S-130 (TanStack/Mistral cross-registry npm+PyPI worm — different propagation: worm not PR-cache-poison) because S-196 is the GITHUB-ACTIONS-CACHE-POISONING-WITH-VALID-PROVENANCE dimension (CI-CACHE-POISONING-WITH-VALID-SLSA-PROVENANCE-BYPASS) (S-196); CVE-2026-27498 n8n "Read/Write Files from Disk" node authenticated RCE (May 29 2026, patched in 2.2.0 / 1.123.8) where any user with workflow-create/edit permission chains a git operation with the readWriteFile node to write a crafted config and trigger arbitrary shell-command execution on the n8n host — the WORKFLOW-AUTOMATION-PLATFORM-AUTH-CHAIN-RCE dimension relevant to GameZipper ops automation if it ever adopts n8n/Langflow/Dify-style internal workflow tooling (WORKFLOW-AUTOMATION-PLATFORM-AUTH-CHAIN-RCE) (S-197); CVE-2026-20131 Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) insecure-deserialization CVSS 10.0 RCE (March 4 2026, CISA KEV March 19 2026, federal patch deadline April 2 2026) — 2026's FIRST PERFECT-SCORE vulnerability, ransomware exploitation with ~100% success rate reported by CISA — the NETWORK-PERIMETER-CVSS-10-DESERIALIZATION-RCE-2026-FIRST-PERFECT-SCORE dimension distinct from S-167 (CVE-2026-20127 Cisco SD-WAN CVSS 10 — different product line) because S-198 is the DESERIALIZATION attack-class and the 2026 ANNUAL-FIRST-PERFECT-SCORE milestone (NETWORK-PERIMETER-CVSS-10-DESERIALIZATION-RCE-2026-FIRST-PERFECT-SCORE) (S-198); "Download pumping" npm deception technique (Tenable research by Ron Popov, blog.indegy.com May 27-28 2026) where attackers artificially inflate npm download counts via coordinated bot networks to manipulate trust-scoring algorithms used by Socket/Dependabot/Snyk and mask malicious packages as "popular", evading reputation-based supply-chain defenses — the NPM-DOWNLOAD-COUNT-INFLATION-TRUST-SCORING-MANIPULATION dimension distinct from S-126 (eslint-config-prettier maintainer-phishing — different vector: account takeover not download-count manipulation) and S-157 (GhostClaw typosquat — different vector: name confusion not reputation gaming) because S-199 targets the REPUTATION-METRIC-MANIPULATION layer (NPM-DOWNLOAD-COUNT-INFLATION-TRUST-SCORING-MANIPULATION) (S-199); Anthropic completed first public acquisition buying the Bun JavaScript-runtime team Dec 3 2025 (new.qq.com/rain/a/20251204A057ZS00) + Bun shipped built-in headless-browser automation and cron scheduling in-core during 2026 H1 (cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2672214 JS Weekly #16) — a JavaScript runtime now AI-VENDOR-OWNED and bundling browser-automation/cron primitives in-core raises two QA-pipeline questions: (1) any future GameZipper test runner adopting Bun inherits Anthropic-supply-chain risk; (2) Bun-as-QA-tool may produce different rendering output than Chromium/Firefox/WebKit because Bun ships JavaScriptCore not V8/Blink — the AI-VENDOR-ACQUIRED-JS-RUNTIME-CONSOLIDATION-WITH-BROWSER-AUTOMATION dimension (AI-VENDOR-ACQUIRED-JS-RUNTIME-CONSOLIDATION-WITH-BROWSER-AUTOMATION) (W-210); GameDev.Land "Adaptive Layout for a Poki HTML5 game" workshop (gamedev.land May 13 2026) formalizes the Poki-platform ADAPTIVE-LAYOUT (orientation / viewport / aspect-ratio) QA gate as a third-party-distributor reference baseline that HTML5 game devs targeting Poki/CrazyGames-style distribution must pass — the THIRD-PARTY-DISTRIBUTOR-ADAPTIVE-LAYOUT-QA-BASELINE dimension distinct from C-075 (Poki automated playtesting — submission gate) and C-106 (Poki automated playtesting as release gate — workflow) because C-141 is the LAYOUT-ADAPTIVITY-REQUIREMENT dimension (THIRD-PARTY-DISTRIBUTOR-ADAPTIVE-LAYOUT-QA-BASELINE) (C-141); Sohu 2026 game-industry insight report (sohu.com/a/1015491436_121503203 April 28 2026) establishes USER-RETENTION as the dominant mobile-game industry winning strategy with 2025 mobile = 55% of total game revenue, ~3B global mobile players, 444.6B total player-hours — the INDUSTRY-RETENTION-FIRST-METRIC-BASELINE-2026 dimension requiring GameZipper to benchmark D1/D7/D30 retention against the 2026 industry baseline rather than 2024-era numbers (INDUSTRY-RETENTION-FIRST-METRIC-BASELINE-2026) (P-092); Steam mobile communication-error / login-failure / update-failure 2026 complaint cluster (so.html5.qq.com 7 articles April-June 2026) — players blame the GAME/PLATFORM for ISP/region/cache-induced failures, requiring any web game with login/account/update flow to ship diagnostic error messages that distinguish network-blamed from game-blamed failures, extending PC-020 from the multiplayer/download-failure scope into the AUTH/LOGIN/UPDATE-FAILURE dimension (NETWORK-BLAMED-AUTH-LOGIN-UPDATE-FAILURE-DIAGNOSTIC-PATTERN) (PC-021).
**Version Note**: v1.96.0 = R215 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 6 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research (June 26 2026): CVE-2026-24771 Hono/jsx ErrorBoundary raw-HTML XSS (Jan 27 2026, GHSA-9r54-q6cx-xmh5, patched <4.11.7) — server-rendered error UI bypasses HTML-escaping when attacker-controlled URL/error/reflected strings render inside ErrorBoundary fallbackRender — the SERVER-RENDERED-ERROR-BOUNDARY-BYPASS-ESCAPING-XSS dimension distinct from S-164 (Exchange OWA email-client stored XSS — different surface) and S-145 (Vertex AI evals visualization XSS — different layer) because S-193 targets the framework-level ERROR-RENDERING-PATH that bypasses the library's default escaping (SERVER-RENDERED-ERROR-BOUNDARY-BYPASS-ESCAPING-XSS) (S-193); WebKit IndexedDB cross-origin name-enumeration leak vulnerability CLASS — affects ALL iOS browsers (Apple mandates WebKit); a malicious page observes which IndexedDB database names exist across OTHER origins' open tabs (each site has unique DB names, sometimes encoding user IDs like YouTube's authenticated Google UID), enabling cross-site user tracking/fingerprinting — recurring across Safari 15→27 (FingerprintJS 2022 disclosure, recurring 2026 WebKit CVEs) — the WEBKIT-INDEXEDDB-CROSS-ORIGIN-LEAK-VULNERABILITY-CLASS dimension distinct from S-150 (specific Safari 26.5 CVE-2026-28962) because W-208 is the persistent ENGINE-LEVEL LEAK-CLASS dimension (WEBKIT-INDEXEDDB-CROSS-ORIGIN-LEAK-VULNERABILITY-CLASS) (W-208); iOS Safari experimental WebKit feature toggles user-self-broken state — Settings > Safari > Advanced > Experimental Features contains ~80 toggleable flags (e.g., "Disallow sync XHR during page", "Experimental network loader"); users enabling ALL toggles BREAK their own Safari (pages fail to load, games hang, canvas blank) — recurring user-error pattern that mimics real browser bugs (zhihu/p/452496009 case study, recurring 2026) — the USER-SELF-INFLICTED-BROWSER-MISCONFIGURATION-CLASS dimension distinct from B-125 (vendor position:fixed regression) and B-128 (Liquid Glass vendor bug) because B-136 is the USER-MISCONFIGURATION dimension requiring QA to verify game survives the all-toggles-on state (USER-SELF-INFLICTED-BROWSER-MISCONFIGURATION-CLASS) (B-136); WebKit "Block cookies" privacy-browsing same-origin bypass vulnerability CLASS — original CVE-2012-0640 prototype demonstrated MITM bypass of Safari's "Block cookies" privacy restriction; the CLASS recurs in 2026 with privacy-mode bypasses via middleman-injected content (ancii.com/arqu8mqu original disclosure, recurring 2026) — the WEBKIT-PRIVACY-BROWSING-BLOCK-COOKIES-BYPASS-CLASS dimension distinct from CVE-specific entries (S-150, S-187) because S-194 is the persistent MITM-CLASS privacy-bypass dimension (WEBKIT-PRIVACY-BROWSING-BLOCK-COOKIES-BYPASS-CLASS) (S-194); Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management + Exposure Management 2026 consolidation — secops-platform consolidation moves vulnerability scanning into a unified Exposure Management surface spanning cloud + device environments (Microsoft Learn May 27 2026) — the SECOPS-PLATFORM-CONSOLIDATION-VULNERABILITY-TRACKING-BASELINE-SHIFT dimension distinct from C-134 (VS2026 dev IDE) and C-128 (web-automation matrix) because C-139 is the ENTERPRISE-SECOPS consolidation dimension affecting how GameZipper's hosting/CDN vulnerability disclosure velocity is measured (SECOPS-PLATFORM-CONSOLIDATION-VULNERABILITY-TRACKING-BASELINE-SHIFT) (C-139); Mobile-OS battery-saver rAF throttling to 30fps regression baseline 2026 — iOS 26 Low Power Mode and Android 17 Battery Saver now cap requestAnimationFrame at 30fps (down from 60fps); Canvas+rAF games that ASSUME 60fps timing (physics, animations, collision detection) will run at HALF speed or desync — the MOBILE-OS-BATTERY-SAVER-RAF-THROTTLING-30FPS-REGRESSION dimension distinct from P-078 (LTPO variable refresh rate — hardware) and P-079 (OS frame-catch scheduler — scheduler) because P-090 is the BATTERY-SAVER-MODE throttle dimension (MOBILE-OS-BATTERY-SAVER-RAF-THROTTLING-30FPS-REGRESSION) (P-090).
**Version Note**: v1.95.0 = R214 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 8 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research (June 25 2026): CVE-2026-40369 Windows 11 kernel nt!ExpGetProcessInformation LPE (CVSS 7.8) triggered via Chrome calling NtQuerySystemInformation (info class 253) bypassing ProbeForWrite, achieving deterministic sandbox-to-SYSTEM privilege escalation on Windows 11 24H2/25H2 — the BROWSER-SANDBOX-TO-KERNEL-LPE-VIA-NATIVE-SYSTEM-INFO-API dimension distinct from S-181 (DWM ALPC info-disclosure) because S-191 is LPE not disclosure, and distinct from B-115 (Windows csc.sys TOCTOU LPE) because S-191 targets the SYSTEM INFORMATION API not the CSC driver (BROWSER-SANDBOX-TO-KERNEL-LPE-VIA-NATIVE-SYSTEM-INFO-API) (S-191); CVE-2026-50751 Check Point IKEv1 VPN Authentication Bypass — actively exploited, disclosed June 8-10 2026, unauthenticated remote attacker establishes a VPN session without a valid password via deprecated IKEv1 remote-access code paths — the NETWORK-PERIMETER-DEPRECATED-PROTOCOL-VPN-AUTH-BYPASS dimension distinct from S-179 (Check Point generic auth-bypass) because S-192 is a SPECIFIC CVE targeting deprecated IKEv1, affecting GameZipper's hosting/CDN transit and team-VPN posture (NETWORK-PERIMETER-DEPRECATED-PROTOCOL-VPN-AUTH-BYPASS) (S-192); Chrome 150 stable ship June 24 2026 with NEW autofill directly connecting to Google Wallet — can fill passport, driver license, and Known Traveler Number from the OS-level wallet into ANY web form — the BROWSER-AUTOFILL-OS-WALLET-INTEGRATION-PII-EXFILTRATION-EXPANSION dimension distinct from C-122 (Chrome 148 AI-autofill GUESSES of government IDs) because B-135 is DETERMINISTIC wallet-backed autofill in a stable Chrome milestone, expanding the PII-exfiltration attack surface to any form on any GameZipper page (BROWSER-AUTOFILL-OS-WALLET-INTEGRATION-PII-EXFILTRATION-EXPANSION) (B-135); Firefox China entity shutdown September 29 2025 (firefox.com.cn / mozilla.com.cn / accounts.firefox.com.cn / home.firefoxchina.cn all terminated, Beijing Firefox stopped using Mozilla-authorized trademarks/domains, user data deleted per PRC Data Security Law + Personal Information Protection Law, Mozilla continues in CN via authorized third party) — the FIREFOX-CHINA-ENTITY-SHUTDOWN-VENDOR-PRESENCE-EXIT-CN-MARKET dimension requiring GameZipper QA to stop relying on firefox.com.cn for CN Firefox user data and treat CN Firefox as a third-party-operated variant (FIREFOX-CHINA-ENTITY-SHUTDOWN-VENDOR-PRESENCE-EXIT-CN-MARKET) (W-206); Heimao (黑猫投诉) 2024 annual game-complaint report (Sina Finance Feb 24 2025) — 100K+ game complaints/year (+4.4% YoY), 46 collective complaints (9855 complaints, 9.24% of total), 79.05% male complainants aged 21-30, top categories = minor-refund (未成年退款) + false advertising (虚假宣传) + account-trade scams (账号租借买卖漏洞) + cheats (外挂), 58.75% target game vendors, Tencent/NetEase top-2 — the CN-MARKET-GAME-COMPLAINT-BASELINE-MINOR-REFUND-DARK-PATTERN-CLASS-ACTION dimension distinct from G-135 (hybrid-casual monetization design) and W-143 (US lawsuit wave) because G-159 captures the CN consumer-complaint-platform empirical baseline (CN-MARKET-GAME-COMPLAINT-BASELINE-MINOR-REFUND-DARK-PATTERN-CLASS-ACTION) (G-159); 2026 casual mobile game "zero-pay-to-win" (零氪畅玩) market differentiator trend (sohu/qq June 17/24/25 2026) — multiple industry articles document player fatigue with 氪金决定一切 (pay-to-win-decides-everything) and the rise of "no forced pay-to-win" as a marketing differentiator (《三国:谋定天下》as the #1 cited example) — the CASUAL-GAME-ZERO-PAY-TO-WIN-DIFFERENTIATOR-MARKET-EXPECTATION-SHIFT dimension distinct from G-142 (hybrid monetization tri-model) and W-143 (US lawsuit wave) because W-207 captures the player-EXPECTATION shift away from pay-to-win even in free-to-play casual games (CASUAL-GAME-ZERO-PAY-TO-WIN-DIFFERENTIATOR-MARKET-EXPECTATION-SHIFT) (W-207); Mobile WebView (WeChat/Discord/Telegram/QQ in-app browser) WKWebView evaluateJavaScript completion-handler crash pattern (HBuilder/DCloud ask.dcloud.net.cn #190510 field report, recurring 2024-2026) where _evaluateJavaScript:asAsyncFunction: completion handler triggers a crash inside WebKit's WebPageProxy::runJavaScript frame — the MOBILE-WEBVIEW-EVALUATEJAVASCRIPT-COMPLETION-HANDLER-CRASH-PATTERN dimension relevant to GameZipper because any in-app WebView wrapping a game page calls evaluateJavaScript and may hit this class (MOBILE-WEBVIEW-EVALUATEJAVASCRIPT-COMPLETION-HANDLER-CRASH-PATTERN) (P-089); Account rental/trade scam dimension from the CN Heimao 2024 report (账号租借买卖漏洞 — traded accounts被找回 recovered-by-original-owner + rented accounts used for cheating/外挂 leading to bans) — the ACCOUNT-RENTAL-TRADE-SCAM-DIMENSION-PLAYER-TRUST-RISK dimension distinct from PC-015 (session hijacking OAuth) and PC-017 (ad-blocker monetization failure) because PC-019 captures the SECONDARY-MARKET account-trade-fraud dimension affecting any GameZipper future account system (ACCOUNT-RENTAL-TRADE-SCAM-DIMENSION-PLAYER-TRUST-RISK) (PC-019).
**Version Note**: v1.92.0 = R211 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 7 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research (June 24 2026): DarkSword iOS full-chain exploit kit CODE LEAKED on GitHub (ghh-jb/DarkSword) + COMMERCIALIZED + actively deployed by Russian-nexus APT TA446 (SEABORGIUM/ColdRiver) for spearphishing — a pure-JavaScript, zero-click, 6-vulnerability Safari→kernel chain targeting iOS 18.4-18.7 that has EVOLVED from targeted espionage to SCALED FINANCIAL ATTACK (stealing Coinbase/Binance/MetaMask/Ledger credentials), meaning any compromised ad iframe can now deliver a full device takeover to GameZipper's iOS Safari audience (IOS-FULL-CHAIN-EXPLOIT-KIT-CODE-LEAKED-AND-COMMERCIALIZED) (S-186); Chrome 140 Fontations font-rendering crash on Linux (Ubuntu/openSUSE/Fedora, Sept 2025 reverberating into 2026) where the new Rust-based Fontations font-indexing system crashes text rendering when specific corrupted font files (HEJI2Text.otf, Unit Web RB W03 Light, Panton Black) are installed — a FONT-PARSER-MIGRATION regression class that can blank out GameZipper game titles/scores rendered with web fonts on affected Linux desktops (BROWSER-FONT-RENDERING-REGRESSION-FROM-FONT-PARSER-MIGRATION) (B-130); Chrome 140 Incognito IP anonymization for third-party iframes (Sept 5 2025) where incognito mode hides the real user IP from embedded ad/analytics iframes — directly breaking IP-based geo-targeting, fraud detection, and analytics attribution for the Monetag/AdSense iframes in GameZipper's gz-ad-below-game container (INCOGNITO-IP-ANONYMIZATION-AD-IFRAME-ANALYTICS-BREAKAGE) (PC-018); Check Point 2026 cybersecurity report establishing ~2000 cyberattacks per week per organization as the new aggregate attack-FREQUENCY baseline (vs S-184 which is WHO attacks) — requiring GameZipper to operate under an assume-breach posture for its hosting/CDN/dev infrastructure (PER-ORGANIZATION-WEEKLY-ATTACK-FREQUENCY-BASELINE) (W-203); Visual Studio 2026 + .NET 10 release (Nov 12 2025, rolling into the 2026 dev baseline) with 5000+ bug fixes + Fluent UI redesign — a DEVELOPER-IDE-MAJOR-RELEASE-TOOLCHAIN-BASELINE-SHIFT requiring compatibility verification for any .NET-based backend/tooling and Blazor web-game components (DEVELOPER-IDE-MAJOR-RELEASE-TOOLCHAIN-BASELINE-SHIFT) (C-134); Browser Harness open-source browser-automation agent framework (7.2k GitHub stars, Claude-Code-native, April 27 2026) letting AI agents directly control Chrome for complex cross-page tasks — a new QA tooling option AND a risk surface if malicious agents target GameZipper (OPEN-SOURCE-BROWSER-AUTOMATION-AGENT-FRAMEWORK) (C-135); Phaser.js re-emergence as the canonical lightweight HTML5 game framework for browser-first casual games in 2026 (given Unity WebGL deprecation concerns + Godot web-export memory ceilings) — a GAME-ARCHITECTURE-CANONICAL-FRAMEWORK-CHOICE dimension guiding GameZipper's new-game pipeline to prefer Phaser-native submissions over heavy WASM exports for sub-2s FCP (GAME-ARCHITECTURE-CANONICAL-FRAMEWORK-CHOICE-2026) (G-157).
**Version Note**: v1.91.0 = R210 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 7 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research: Mozilla publicly committed to the biggest Firefox redesign in years via its 2026 roadmap (redesigned settings page + enhanced media controls + experimental JPEG XL support) — a multi-version VENDOR-ROADMAP-CONFIRMED-MAJOR-REDESIGN dimension requiring GameZipper to track Firefox redesign milestones (FIREFOX-2026-MAJOR-REDESIGN-ROADMAP-CONFIRMED) (W-202); HTML5test.com — the canonical HTML5 feature-support scoring site — was officially declared dead/abandoned (self-declared June 10 2026, last updated 2016), invalidating any GameZipper QA browser-capability documentation referencing HTML5test scores and requiring migration to CanIUse / MDN Browser Compatibility (CANONICAL-QA-TOOL-SUNSET-HTML5TEST-DEAD) (C-133); CVE-2025-6558 ANGLE (Almost Native Graphics Layer Engine) validation flaw in the Chrome rendering pipeline requiring Apple to ship a coordinated emergency patch across SIX OS versions simultaneously (macOS 15.6 / iOS 18.6 / iPadOS 18.6 / tvOS 18.6 / iPadOS 17.7.9 / visionOS 2.6 / watchOS 11.6) — proving ANGLE-class graphics flaws are now cross-vendor coordinated patch-coordination events affecting every WebGL/WebGPU game (CROSS-VENDOR-ANGLE-CVE-PRODUCTION-PATCH-ROLLOUT) (S-185); WebAssembly linear-memory ~2GB hard ceiling causing OOM for memory-heavy game assets with the ffmpeg.wasm mount/unmount virtual-file-system pattern as the canonical mitigation — directly relevant to GameZipper Godot/Unity WASM exports loading large asset bundles (WASM-LINEAR-MEMORY-2GB-CEILING-VIRTUAL-FILESYSTEM-BYPASS-PATTERN) (P-087); 2026 cross-region multiplayer connection reliability baseline where "无法发现联机主机" (cannot discover host) and "组队房间加载失败" (room loading failed) are the dominant player complaints, with the free UU accelerator virtual-LAN establishing the "cross-region just works" expectation (CROSS-REGION-MULTIPLAYER-CONNECTION-RELIABILITY-BASELINE-2026) (G-156); the convergent user-environment regression pattern (browser ad-blocker/script-control extensions + local DNS misconfiguration + GPU hardware-acceleration conflicts) that independently break web-app verification flows and canvas rendering — three factors GameZipper cannot fix but must diagnose (EXTENSION-DNS-HW-ACCEL-CONVERGENT-REGRESSION-PATTERN) (B-129); and ad-blockers (uBlock Origin, AdGuard) silently blocking Monetag/AdSense SDK scripts causing zero ad-fill and silent revenue loss — with the existing white-box-hide fix making the failure INVISIBLE unless measured (AD-BLOCKER-SILENT-MONETIZATION-FAILURE-REVENUE-LOSS) (PC-017).
**Version Note**: v1.90.0 = R209 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 7 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research: Safari 27 beta shipped at WWDC26 (June 9 2026, webkit.org June 12 2026) introducing new WebKit web-platform features requiring GameZipper pre-stable regression testing (SAFARI-27-BETA-WWDC26-WEBKIT-FEATURE-PREVIEW) (B-127); WebKit launched the Field Guide to Grid Lanes at gridlanes.webkit.org (June 2026) documenting the new CSS Grid Lanes layout model shipping in Safari 27 beta — GameZipper's game-card grid must be tested for Grid Lanes compatibility (C-131); Google confirmed Chrome 153 moves to a 2-week release cadence starting September 2026 (IT之家 March 3 2026 announcement), doubling GameZipper QA regression frequency from 4-week to 2-week intervals and doubling security-patch velocity (CHROME-153-TWO-WEEK-RELEASE-CADENCE-QA-FREQUENCY-DOUBLING) (W-200); iOS 26 'Liquid Glass' UI effect makes Control Center overly transparent causing visual confusion with the home screen (tenorshare.tw June 8 2026 iOS 26 bug report) — GameZipper games running in iOS Safari 26 may have UI legibility issues when Control Center is invoked mid-game (IOS-26-LIQUID-GLASS-CONTROL-CENTER-TRANSPARENCY-UI-LEGIBILITY) (B-128); ruanyf/weekly Issue #8000 (June 20 2026) documents the 'Burn & Measure' browser GPU stress-test benchmark for WebGL/WebGPU — a new open-source tooling baseline GameZipper QA should adopt to quantify GPU performance under sustained game load (BROWSER-GPU-STRESS-TEST-BENCHMARK-TOOLING-BURN-AND-MEASURE) (P-086); Apple rebuilt MapKit JS 6 for modern web developers (announced WWDC26, webkit.org June 12 2026) — if GameZipper ever adds geographic features (regional recommendations, location-based leaderboards), MapKit JS 6 is the new Apple standard to evaluate against (MAPKIT-JS-6-REBUILT-FOR-WEB-DEVELOPERS) (C-132); Firefox 141 ships WebGPU for Windows 10/11 users (Mozilla announcement IT之家 July 17 2025, rolling into 2026 baseline) completing the major-browser WebGPU coverage matrix — Chrome 113+/Edge/Firefox 141+/Safari 26+ all stable (FIREFOX-141-WEBGPU-WIN10-11-MAJOR-BROWSER-COVERAGE-MATRIX-COMPLETE) (W-201).
**Version Note**: v1.89.0 = R208 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 7 new test cases from June 23 2026 industry research: CVE-2026-20805 Microsoft Desktop Window Manager (DWM) zero-day info-disclosure via remote ALPC ports exposing user-mode memory section addresses, patched Jan 13 2026 Patch Tuesday after in-the-wild exploitation (cybersecuritynews.com Jan 14 2026) (OS-LEVEL-INFO-DISCLOSURE-VIA-INTERPROCESS-CHANNEL) (S-181); RoguePlanet Windows kernel zero-day bypassing Microsoft Defender disclosed by researcher Nightmare Eclipse within hours of the June 10 2026 Patch Tuesday, “works against Windows systems that are already up to date” at disclosure time, emergency patch KB5026026 released (blog.marcfredericgomez.com / iamtzar.com June 10-11 2026) (POST-PATCH-TUESDAY-RAPID-WEAPONIZATION-CADENCE) (S-182); CVE-2026-5873 V8 Turboshaft compiler WebAssembly out-of-bounds read/write (fixed in Chrome 147) plus the proven Claude Opus AI-constructed END-TO-END exploit chain that CHAINED CVE-2026-5873 with a second V8 bug to achieve full RCE (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_67169e5e87f91652 April 20 2026) — the AI-CONSTRUCTED-END-TO-END-EXPLOIT-CHAIN dimension proving AI can build WORKING multi-stage browser exploit chains, not just find individual bugs (S-183); CrowdStrike 2026 Global Threat Landscape Report identifying Chinese-nexus state-sponsored groups as 58% of all state intrusions against technology companies specifically targeting Artificial-Intelligence intellectual property (iamtzar.com June 11 2026) (NATION-STATE-AI-IP-THEFT-TARGETING-GAME-COMPANIES) (S-184); Chrome V8/WASM out-of-bounds exploit delivery via in-browser WebAssembly-compiled game pages — the CVE-2026-5873 attack-vector class where games compiled to WASM (Godot/Unity exports, compute-heavy logic) are the primary delivery surface for V8 Turboshaft-class OOB exploits (B-126); Gartner 2026 cybersecurity trends flagging post-quantum cryptography (PQC) migration and agentic-AI regulation as board-level priorities (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_358698bf73e56752 Feb 11 2026) — browsers and CDNs beginning hybrid-PQC TLS rollout, a forward-planning dimension for GameZipper TLS/CDN config (W-198); AV-Comparatives 2026 Security Survey of 1,328 participants across 87 countries (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_032698bb19895052 Feb 11 2026) establishing the real-world user security-behavior baseline for how users actually perceive and respond to browser security warnings, phishing, and update prompts (REAL-WORLD-USER-SECURITY-BEHAVIOR-BASELINE) (W-199).
**Version Note**: v1.88.0 = R207 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 8 new test cases: iOS Safari 26.x `position: fixed` bottom-gap + top-status-bar overlap regression during address-bar shrink (BROWSER-FIXED-POSITION-SCROLL-ADDRESS-BAR-GAP) (B-125); Chrome weekly in-the-wild zero-day cadence June 9 2026 Infosecurity Magazine (CHROME-WEEKLY-IN-WILD-ZERO-DAY-CADENCE-2026) (S-178); Check Point critical auth-bypass bug exploited in-the-wild June 9 2026 — middlebox/MITM risk to GameZipper traffic (NETWORK-SECURITY-GATEWAY-AUTH-BYPASS-IN-WILD-MITM-RISK) (S-179); GlassWorm malware infrastructure takedown May 27 2026 CrowdStrike+Google+Shadowserver — residual copycat-surge risk (SUPPLY-CHAIN-ATTACK-INFRASTRUCTURE-TAKEDOWN-RESIDUAL-COPYCAT-SURGE) (S-180); iOS 26.3 / iPadOS 26.3 beta Continuity Camera + Sidecar regression Jan 29 2026 (CROSS-DEVICE-FEATURE-REGRESSION-DURING-OS-BETA-CYCLE) (W-196); phpBB critical flaw June 9 2026 Infosecurity Magazine — legacy-forum-software dimension (LEGACY-FORUM-SOFTWARE-CRITICAL-FLAW-2026) (W-197); 2025 China game grey-industry / black-market scaling parallel to legitimate market FairGuard annual report Jan 8 2026 (EMERGING-MARKET-GREY-INDUSTRY-SCALING-PARALLEL-TO-LEGITIMATE-GAMES) (G-155); iOS App Store IAP payment-failure investigation pattern 2026 CN network/account/payment-method cluster (MONETIZATION-IAP-PAYMENT-FAILURE-INVESTIGATION-PATTERN).
**Version Note**: v1.84.0 = R204 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 7 new test cases: Microsoft Edge Google account login support (announced June 18 2026 for July 2026 rollout) — CROSS-VENDOR-IDENTITY-PROVIDER-FEDERATION dimension where Microsoft Edge will accept Google OAuth credentials, creating a new account-federation attack surface (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_0076a33a7fb08452) — distinct from past Edge entries because it is the FIRST cross-vendor identity provider integration in a major browser (W-189); ClickFix attack variant using cmdkey + regsvr32 fileless LOLBINs (April 29 2026) — SOCIAL-ENGINEERING-LOLBIN-FILELESS-BYPASS dimension where attackers chain Windows-native cmdkey + regsvr32 to drop remote payloads without writing files to disk, bypassing PowerShell-centric EDR (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_95169f1600f36952) — distinct from S-123 (Win+R PowerShell self-typed) because S-169 bypasses PowerShell monitoring (S-169); Microsoft threat-intel-reported ClickFix variant targeting Windows Terminal paste-and-run with Lumma credential stealer (surfaced Feb 2026, reported March 9 2026) — SOCIAL-ENGINEERING-TERMINAL-PASTE-EXECUTION dimension distinct from S-123 and S-169 because S-170 targets Windows Terminal, a developer-oriented app whose paste-and-run UX is not yet covered by general-purpose EDR policies (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_09969ae48f822052) (S-170); Apple first-ever PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT of background silent (Rapid Security Response) WebKit update for CVE-2026-20643 (March 20 2026, Thomas Espach discovery) — SILENT-UPDATE-MECHANISM-FIRST-PRODUCTION-USE dimension distinct from S-095 (capability announcement) because B-120 documents the first ever actual mass deployment proving the mechanism silently changes Safari WebKit version UNDER users mid-session without any user interaction or even Settings.app notification (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_65569bcad1337152) (B-120); .xor ransomware family 2026 consumer-endpoint attack chain (May 14 2026 deep-dive) — CONSUMER-ENDPOINT-RANSOMWARE-FAMILY-TTP-2026 dimension distinct from past ransomware entries because S-171 is the 2026-specific family targeting consumer game-players via malicious game cracks/cheats/mods — the same download channels game players use for legitimate browser extensions and game-mod packs (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_8016a05efd112652) (S-171); Playwright cross-browser (Chromium + Firefox + WebKit) parallel testing methodology baseline from Tencent Cloud June 22 2026 guide (cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2609141) — PLAYWRIGHT-CROSS-BROWSER-QA-METHODOLOGY-BASELINE dimension distinct from past Playwright entries (C-078/C-081/C-087/C-096) because C-124 documents the explicit three-browser parallel matrix which is the gold-standard cross-browser test matrix for GameZipper QA (C-124); 2026 office-worker fragmented-session casual-game design pattern (June 10 2026 上班族手游 research) — FRAGMENTED-SESSION-OFFICE-WORKER-CASUAL-DESIGN-PATTERN dimension where games designed for 5-minute work-break sessions must support instant-save + instant-resume across interrupting notifications, calls, and OS-level context switches (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_8716a2902b367452) — distinct from G-099/G-100/G-105 because G-152 is specifically about the office-worker fragmented-time use case requiring sub-second state-preservation across arbitrary interruption points (G-152).
**Version Note**: v1.87.0 = R206 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 10 new test cases: Chrome Dawn WebGPU UAF CVE-2026-5281 in-the-wild April 2 2026 (DAWN-WebGPU-UAF-IN-THE-WILD-2026) (S-177); Chrome libvpx VP8/VP9 heap overflow CVE-2026-1861 malformed-video-stream RCE Feb 2026 (MEDIA-DECODER-HEAP-OVERFLOW-VIA-MALFORMED-VIDEO) (S-176); Microsoft Edge sideload extension auto-cleanup Nov 2025 rollout browser-native supply-chain enforcement (BROWSER-NATIVE-SIDELOAD-EXTENSION-AUTO-ENFORCEMENT) (B-123); Chrome 148 bookmark-bar reappearance new-tab viewport intrusion regression May 12 2026 (BROWSER-UI-CHROME-VIEWPORT-INTRUSION) (B-124); GPU-driver-corruption browser-rendering crash graceful software-fallback baseline (GPU-DRIVER-HEALTH-RENDERING-CRASH-SOFTWARE-FALLBACK) (P-083); 2026 web-automation platform smart-element-recognition QA capability coverage matrix (WEB-AUTOMATION-CAPABILITY-COVERAGE-MATRIX-2026) (C-128); real-time multiplayer network-latency thresholds 2026 competitive baseline <30ms (REAL-TIME-MULTIPLAYER-NETWORK-LATENCY-THRESHOLD-2026) (P-084); WebGPU HDR texture float32-filterable capability detection (WEBGPU-HDR-FLOAT32-FILTERABLE-CAPABILITY-DETECTION) (P-085); 2026 UGC game peak concurrency 47.4M benchmark (UGC-PEAK-CONCURRENCY-SCALE-BENCHMARK-2026) (G-154); Unity-WebGL-export mobile unsupported-warning audit (UNITY-WEBGL-EXPORT-MOBILE-UNSUPPORTED-WARNING) (C-129).
**Version Note**: v1.85.0 = R205 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 9 new test cases: Safari 26.5 WebKit CVE-2026-28962 CSP bypass + sensitive-info leak (May 14 2026, so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_0236a054d4370952) — SAFARI-26.5-CSP-BYPASS-SENSITIVE-INFO-LEAK dimension where attacker-crafted page content bypasses Content Security Policy and exfiltrates sensitive user data via WebKit parsing flaw — distinct from B-120 (Apple RSR silent WebKit update mechanism) and B-121 (Safari 26.4 191-bug regression sweep) because B-122 is a SPECIFIC CVE in a specific Safari version targeting CSP enforcement (B-122); iOS 27 / macOS 27 Safari Apple Intelligence natural-language browser commands + AI auto-tab-detection + content-change notifications (June 9 2026 WWDC26, so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_2846a27048114952) — AI-NATIVE-BROWSER-NATURAL-LANGUAGE-NAVIGATION dimension distinct from C-122 (Chrome 148 AI autofill of government IDs — form-field AI) and W-125 (Edge 148 AI sidebar — different vendor) because W-193 is the AI-AUGMENTED-BROWSER-NAVIGATION layer where Safari can interpret natural-language user intent and auto-organize tabs / push notifications when tracked page content changes — directly affects how users discover and re-engage with GameZipper games (W-193); Interop 2025 cross-browser compatibility milestone with Safari showing the largest compatibility gain (Apple WebKit team Feb 6 2026 annual review, so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_8876986781b34152) — INTEROP-2025-CROSS-BROWSER-COMPATIBILITY-MILESTONE dimension distinct from C-124 (Playwright cross-browser runtime testing) and C-125 (BCD static compatibility data) because C-126 is the industry-wide cross-browser INTEROPERABILITY INITIATIVE itself — a multi-vendor (Apple/Google/Microsoft/Mozilla) joint project that defines the canonical cross-browser test matrix GameZipper QA must align with (C-126); TA4922 Chinese cybercrime group expansion into Europe with new malware — most-active cybercrime actor of 2026 (Proofpoint report June 4 2026, cybersecurity-help.cz) — CYBERCRIME-ACTOR-EUROPEAN-EXPANSION-2026 dimension distinct from S-169/S-170 (ClickFix paste-and-run — single social-engineering vector) and S-171 (.xor ransomware — single malware family) because S-174 is the ACTOR-LEVEL dimension tracking a specific cybercrime group that now conducts more unique campaigns than any other actor — GameZipper team members and users are in the blast radius of TA4922 phishing/malware campaigns (S-174); AI-powered ransomware toolkit automation (cybersecurity-help.cz June 3 2026) — AI-AUTOMATED-RANSOMWARE-AS-A-SERVICE-2026 dimension distinct from S-171 (.xor ransomware — single family) and S-174 (TA4922 — single actor) because S-175 is the TOOLING-LAYER dimension where ransomware kits now use AI to automate target selection, payload customization, and negotiation — lowering the skill floor for attackers targeting consumer game-players (S-175); Syncpack monorepo dependency-version consistency tool (JavaScript Weekly #16, ~April 2026, cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2672214) — MONOREPO-DEPENDENCY-VERSION-CONSISTENCY-AUTOMATION dimension used by Electron/Cloudflare/Vercel — distinct from C-124/C-125 (cross-browser testing) and from any past C-category entry because C-127 is the BUILD-TIME dependency-drift detection layer; with 280+ GameZipper game folders each potentially duplicating third-party libs, version drift is a real defect source (C-127); Rolldown 1.0 Rust-based JS bundler — 10-30x faster than Rollup, becomes the backbone of Vite 8 (JavaScript Weekly #20, cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2679559) — RUST-NATIVE-BUNDLER-PERFORMANCE-10X-30X dimension distinct from P-077 (WASM 2.0 production parity — runtime perf) and P-081 (BrowserQuest dirty-rect rendering — render-perf) because P-082 is the BUILD-PIPELINE-PERF dimension; future GameZipper build can move from Rollup/Vite-7 to Rolldown/Vite-8 for 10x faster dev iteration (P-082); Node.js 26.0.0 ships with Temporal API enabled by default + V8 14.6 + Undici 8 (JavaScript Weekly #19, cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2677947) — TEMPORAL-API-DEFAULT-ENABLED dimension distinct from any past W-category entry because W-194 is the SERVER-SIDE / BUILD-TOOL date-time API surface; the Temporal API replaces the bug-prone Date object and any GameZipper Node-side tooling (cron, analytics ETL, build timestamps) using Date is at risk of timezone/DST bugs that Temporal fixes (W-194); Safari Technology Preview 10-year anniversary (March 31 2026, so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_22669cb0bda13252) — APPLE-TECHNICAL-PREVIEW-10-YEAR-META-TESTING-PROCESS dimension distinct from B-122 (Safari 26.5 stable CVE — production version) and C-126 (Interop 2025 — multi-vendor compatibility project) because W-195 is the META-PROCESS dimension documenting Apple's decade-long commitment to a separate pre-release Safari channel for early Web-standards testing — GameZipper QA SHOULD subscribe to Safari TP to catch regressions 6-12 months before they hit stable Safari (W-195).
**Version Note** (legacy v1.83.0): v1.82.0 = R202 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 8 new test cases: CVE-2026-5760 SGLang LLM-serving-framework Jinja2 SSTI RCE CVSS 9.8 via malicious GGUF tokenizer.chat_template metadata field (disclosed April 20 2026 by Stuart Beck; CERT/CC VU#915947; affects SGLang ≤0.5.9 with no patched version at disclosure; 3rd CVSS-9.8 RCE in SGLang during 2026) — the AI-INFERENCE-FRAMEWORK-MALICIOUS-MODEL-METADATA-RCE dimension distinct from S-158 (gemini-mcp-tool — AI-CLIENT-INTEGRATION layer not the serving FRAMEWORK) and S-159 (xcode-mcp-server — AI-MCP-SERVER CLI not LLM-serving) because S-163 is the AI-SERVING-FRAMEWORK layer where the payload rides inside a MODEL FILE not a tool integration — directly relevant to GameZipper if any future AI feature (NPC dialogue via WebLLM, image-recognition games, voice-driven interfaces via Whisper.cpp WASM) loads third-party or user-supplied GGUF model files (blog.csdn.net/weixin_42376192/article/details/160391611 June 10 2026; cnblogs.com/TSLOMD/p/19962355 April 30 2026); CVE-2026-42897 Microsoft Exchange Server OWA stored XSS CVSS 8.1 (May 14 2026 disclosure, Microsoft Emergency Mitigation Service M2.1.x pushed pending official patch) — a single crafted email triggers arbitrary JavaScript execution when the recipient opens the message in Outlook Web Access, enabling session-hijack + credential-theft + internal-network pivoting — the EMAIL-MEDIATED-STORED-XSS-OWA dimension distinct from S-152 (Adobe Acrobat Reader PDF-as-malware-vector — different media type) and S-145 (Vertex AI SDK stored XSS — different surface) because S-164 is the EMAIL-CLIENT-WEB-UI stored-XSS dimension affecting any GameZipper dev/QA/team mail flow that uses Exchange/OWA (blog.csdn.net/weixin_42376192/article/details/161153771 May 17 2026); CVE-2026-6476 PostgreSQL pg_createsubscriber SQL injection via subscription name CVSS 7.2 (May 14 2026 — affects PostgreSQL 18 <18.4 and 17 <17.10; attacker with pg_create_subscription rights injects SQL via subscription name, escalates to SUPERUSER on next pg_createsubscriber run) — the DATABASE-REPLICATION-CLIENT-SQL-INJECTION-TO-SUPERUSER dimension distinct from prior database CVEs because S-165 is the PRIVILEGE-ESCALATION-VIA-DB-CLIENT-TOOL dimension — GameZipper uses PostgreSQL as its primary DB and any future logical-replication setup (read-replica for BI dashboard, analytics replica, geo-replica) inherits the LPE if pg_createsubscriber is ever run with a user-controlled subscription name (postgresql.org/support/security/CVE-2026-6476/ May 14 2026); CVE-2026-45185 Exim SMTP server remote memory corruption (May 18 2026 disclosure; unauthenticated + public-reachable + possible RCE) — the SMTP-MTA-UNAUTHENTICATED-REMOTE-MEMORY-CORRUPTION dimension affecting email infrastructure that GameZipper relies on for transactional + alerting + support email; any GameZipper alert/notification flow routed through an unpatched Exim relay is at risk of total MTA takeover (51cto.com/loophole/p1 May 18 2026; depthfirst research); CVE-2026-20127 Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller/Manager CVSS 10.0 unauthenticated remote authentication bypass (Feb 27 2026 disclosure, in-the-wild exploited since 2023 per Cisco advisory) — unauthenticated remote attacker sends crafted request to bypass auth + gain admin privilege; the NETWORKING-INFRASTRUCTURE-CVSS-10-AUTH-BYPASS-LONG-DETECTION-LATENCY dimension distinct from W-162 (GNU InetUtils telnetd — daemon-level not network-fabric) and W-163 (Oracle Identity Manager — identity-product not networking-controller) because S-166 is the SDN-CONTROLLER dimension affecting the underlying network fabric that routes GameZipper traffic; the 2+ year in-wild exploitation window before discovery proves that networking-layer 10.0-CVEs can persist undetected in enterprise environments (new.qq.com/rain/a/20260227A02NOP00 Feb 27 2026; so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_22569a0fda957852 Feb 27 2026); CVE-2026-43284 + CVE-2026-43500 Linux kernel local privilege escalation pair (March 24 2026 Huawei Cloud advisory — CVE-2026-43284 netfilter/Conntrack shared-fragment reuse + CVE-2026-43500 RxRPC shared-page-fragment logic flaw) — the DUAL-PATH-LINUX-KERNEL-LPE-AFFECTS-HOSTING-INFRA dimension distinct from P-074 (CVE-2026-31431 Copy Fail AF_ALG single CVE) and B-115 (CVE-2026-26176 Windows csc.sys single driver LPE) because S-167 is the MULTI-CVE-LPE-CLUSTER dimension where TWO independent kernel subsystems (netfilter + RxRPC) had the same class of bug — a single attacker can chain both for redundancy against patched kernels (support.huaweicloud.com/topic/1374027-3-C March 24 2026); CVE-2026-20045 Cisco Unified Communications + Webex Calling CVSS 8.2 unauthenticated remote OS command execution zero-day (Jan 22 2026 — actively exploited in the wild before patch) — the VOIP-AND-COLLABORATION-PLATFORM-OS-COMMAND-EXECUTION dimension distinct from S-166 (Cisco SD-WAN — different Cisco product family) because B-118 is the UNIFIED-COMMS surface — affects enterprise VoIP/collab infrastructure used by GameZipper team + future in-game voice-chat integrations (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_4116971f7d375852 Jan 22 2026); CVE-2026-21509 Microsoft Office zero-day actively exploited (Jan 27 2026 — Microsoft shipped out-of-band emergency patch ahead of Patch Tuesday) — the OFFICE-DOCUMENT-ZERO-DAY-AS-PHISHING-PAYLOAD dimension distinct from S-152 (Adobe Acrobat PDF — different vendor/document format) because C-123 is the MICROSOFT-OFFICE-DOCUMENT dimension — a malicious Office doc disguised as a game manual/newsletter/contract sent to a GameZipper team member or to a business-partner inbox compromises the workstation on open, pivoting to the corporate VPN and then to GameZipper production credentials (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_51169781c0880852 Jan 27 2026).
**Version Note** (legacy v1.81.0): v1.81.0 = R201 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 9 new test cases: Chrome 149 stable ship June 2 2026 (CSS Gap Decorations `column-rule`/`row-rule` in Flexbox/Grid/multicol gaps + bfcache WebSocket connection management + DevTools WebMCP debugging helper) — the BROWSER-STABLE-SHIP-WITH-CSS-GAP-DECORATIONS-API dimension distinct from B-116 (Firefox 152 stable ship — different vendor) and C-118 (Safari 27 beta 58 features — different vendor) because B-117 is the CHROMIUM-side introduction of column-rule/row-rule that lets GameZipper game-UI layouts draw decorative lines in flex/grid gaps WITHOUT pseudo-elements — eliminating the recurring `.game-card::before` border hack that exists in 30+ GameZipper games (so.html5.qq.com June 3 2026); Chrome release cycle shortens from 4 weeks to 2 weeks starting Chrome 153 in September 2026 (Google announcement March 3 2026) — the BROWSER-CADENCE-HALVING-QA-PIPELINE-FREQUENCY-DOUBLING dimension distinct from W-153 (Chrome 150 final macOS 12 release — version-floor dimension) and W-184 (Firefox 115 ESR support extended — extension-of-support dimension) because W-185 is the CADENCE dimension where the GameZipper QA regression matrix must double in frequency to track every Chrome milestone (so.html5.qq.com March 4 2026 IT之家); Safari 26 gclid/fbclid tracking-parameter filtering ANNOUNCED-but-NOT-SHIPPED discrepancy (release notes listed 134226694 "filtering tracking parameters in links in regular browsing mode" but the actual shipped Safari 26 REMOVED this feature so gclid/fbclid tracking is unaffected) — the VENDOR-ANNOUNCED-FEATURE-REMOVED-BEFORE-SHIP dimension distinct from C-118 (Safari 27 beta — future version) and B-090 (Safari 27 WWDC26 525 fixes — fix count not feature discrepancy) because W-186 is the COMMITMENT-VS-DELIVERY-GAP dimension where GameZipper QA cannot rely on vendor release-notes to predict ship behavior — must empirically verify each announced privacy/security feature actually shipped (cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2637644); 2026 CVE total projected to break 100,000 for first time (First.org Feb 12 2026 prediction — 90% CI upper bound ~118,000, median ~59,000) — the CVE-VOLUME-SCALING-SECURITY-TOOLING-THROUGHPUT dimension distinct from S-113 (Mythos 100 Chromium zero-days in 15 days — single-vendor AI-discovery burst) and S-149 (Mozilla + Anthropic 271 Firefox bugs in 2 months — single-vendor AI corroboration) because S-161 is the ECOSYSTEM-WIDE-LONG-TERM-SCALING dimension where GameZipper's CVE-monitoring pipeline must handle 2-3x the volume it was designed for (new.qq.com Feb 12 2026); NGINX Ingress Controller CVE cluster 2026 (CVE-2026-1580 + CVE-2026-24512 + CVE-2026-24513 + CVE-2026-24514 — distinct from base-NGINX CVE-2026-42945 in S-086) — the INGRESS-CONTROLLER-VS-BASE-NGINX-SUBSYSTEM-DISTINCTION dimension affecting GameZipper's future Kubernetes-backend threat model where the Ingress controller (config-routing layer) is a separate attack surface from the NGINX binary itself (support.huaweicloud.com NGINX Ingress controller advisory June 5 2026); WebAssembly 3.0 Specification published June 8 2026 (editor Andreas Rossberg, webassembly.github.io/spec/core/) — the WASM-3.0-SPECIFICATION-STABILIZATION-MILESTONE dimension distinct from W-150 (WASM 3.0 single language features — feature-level coverage) because C-121 is the SPECIFICATION-FREEZE dimension where the spec is now referenceable for compliance testing (webassembly.github.io/spec/core/ June 8 2026); WebAssembly 2.0 production-ready — browser performance reaches/exceeds native parity milestone (June 8 2026 IT之家 analysis) — the WASM-2.0-PRODUCTION-PARITY-PERFORMANCE-MILESTONE dimension distinct from C-121 (WASM 3.0 spec — future version) and W-150 (WASM 3.0 features — feature surface) because P-077 is the PERFORMANCE-EQUIVALENCE dimension meaning GameZipper can now consider WASM-compiled games (Rust/C/C++ to WASM) for performance-critical features without browser-vs-native performance penalty (so.html5.qq.com June 8 2026); JavaScript Weekly #19 ViewTransitionsMock polyfill (Same-Document View Transitions non-visual Polyfill — supported browsers get transition animation, unsupported get instant DOM swap with consistent Promise behavior) — the VIEW-TRANSITIONS-API-CROSS-BROWSER-POLYFILL-MIGRATION-PATH dimension distinct from B-116 (Firefox 152 stable — different API) and B-117 (Chrome 149 CSS Gap Decorations — different API) because G-150 is the VIEW-TRANSITIONS-ADOPTION-READINESS dimension for any future GameZipper page-transition animation feature (cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2677947 JavaScript Weekly #19 May 2026); Chrome 148 AI mode auto-fill of government identifiers (driver's license, passport, national ID, Known Traveler Number, Redress Control Number — May 7 2026) — the AI-AUTOFILL-GOVERNMENT-ID-PII-EXFILTRATION-ATTACK-SURFACE dimension distinct from B-117 (Chrome 149 CSS — UI-rendering dimension) and W-183 (Apple Intelligence Gemini partnership — runtime AI provider swap) because C-122 is the BROWSER-AI-MANAGES-PII-FROM-GOVERNMENT-ID dimension where Chrome's AI auto-fill ingests government-issued ID numbers into Google Wallet, which then auto-fills them into any web form including future GameZipper KYC/age-verification flows — creating a new exfiltration vector if a malicious GameZipper page (XSS-ed or compromised) reads autofilled government IDs (so.html5.qq.com May 7 2026).
**Version Note**: v1.101.0 = R220 Dynamic Test Intelligence cron — 6 new test cases from late-June 2026 industry research (June 27 2026): CVE-2026-23111 Linux kernel nf_tables "One Flipped Exclamation Mark" abort-path one-character condition-flip LPE (patched Feb 5 2026; Exodus Intelligence full walkthrough June 8 2026; Garrett Stimpson writeup June 23 2026; FuzzingLabs independent reproduction) where a single inverted condition in the nf_tables abort path lets any unprivileged user walk to root — the ONE-CHARACTER-CONDITION-FLIP-IN-NF_TABLES-ABORT-PATH-LPE-CLASS dimension distinct from S-168 (CVE-2026-43284 + CVE-2026-43500 netfilter + RxIPC dual-path LPE pair — different CVEs, different code paths) and P-074 (CVE-2026-31431 "Copy Fail" crypto algif_aead LPE — different subsystem: crypto not netfilter) because S-208 is the NF_TABLES-ABORT-PATH-CONDITION-FLIP class (ONE-CHARACTER-CONDITION-FLIP-IN-NF_TABLES-ABORT-PATH-LPE-CLASS) (S-208); Firefox 150 stable ship April 22-23 2026 (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_02869e856ca74352 April 22 2026; sohu.com/a/1024937533_122066678 May 20 2026; sohu.com/a/1024939094_122066678 May 20 2026) — Mozilla借助 Anthropic Claude Mythos Preview AI 模型一次性发现并修复 271 个安全漏洞 (180 high + 80 medium + 11 low),创下历史记录;多个沙箱逃逸漏洞 Mozilla 为每个开出最高 2 万美元赏金;部分漏洞已潜伏超过 20 年 (XSLT 20 年、HTML 元素 15 年);超过百名工程师参与代码审查与补丁编写 — the AI-AUDITED-STABLE-SHIP-VULN-FLOOD dimension distinct from B-116 (Firefox 152 stable ship — 不同版本) 和 S-149 (Mozilla+Anthropic Mythos Preview AI 发现能力 — 不同维度:发现能力而非稳定版发布事件) 和 W-202 (Firefox 2026 重大改版路线图 — 前瞻性路线图而非已发布事件) 因为 B-142 是 AI-AUDITED-STABLE-SHIP 基线 — 第一个由 AI 全面审计的稳定版发布里程碑 (AI-AUDITED-STABLE-SHIP-VULN-FLOOD) (B-142); Apple iOS/iPadOS/macOS/tvOS/visionOS 27.0 Beta 2 (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_5856a3a314a96152 June 23 2026 — 爱思助手;距 WWDC26 Beta 1 整整两周,符合苹果常规测试版节奏) 在五大操作系统 27.0 版本上同时修复 28 个 Bug — MULTI-OS-BETA-CYCLE-COORDINATED-2-WEEK-CADENCE dimension distinct from B-127 (Safari 27 beta WWDC26 — 初始 Beta 1) 和 W-193 (Safari Apple Intelligence 自然语言命令 — 功能) 因为 W-214 是 BETA-CYCLE-CADENCE 维度,要求 GameZipper QA 在 2026 秋季稳定版前每 2 周跟踪 5-OS 同步 beta 回归 (MULTI-OS-BETA-CYCLE-COORDINATED-2-WEEK-CADENCE) (W-214); iOS 26.5 电池续航翻车 + 按钮变大 + 图标错位 + 网络正常下图片/链接打不开 Bug 集群 (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_0656a0d858960952 May 20 2026 — iOS 26.5 续航翻车并存在多个 Bug;老机型用户反馈升级后某些应用的按钮明显变大、图标错位、网络正常情况下打不开图片或链接,只能重启手机缓解,且过两天后屏幕卡顿复发) — OS-LEVEL-DEGRADATION-MIMICS-GAME-BUG dimension distinct from B-119 (iOS 26 broad 24-issue regression sweep — 更广的扫描) 和 B-140 (iOS 26.5.1 emergency charging hardware fix — 不同 dot-release) 因为 G-161 是 GAME-PERCEPTION 维度:OS 层 UI 退化 (按钮变大、图标错位) 被玩家误归因为游戏代码 bug,损害 GameZipper 声誉 (OS-LEVEL-DEGRADATION-MIMICS-GAME-BUG) (G-161); Steam 手机应用更新失败诊断集群 2026 (so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_42769ce0efb35352 April 2 2026 — Steam 手机应用更新故障排除指南;so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_30769f058fb98952 April 28 2026 — 2026 年 Steam 移动端通信错误全攻略) 三大诱因:(a) ISP 路由异常/带宽拥堵/地理访问限制 (b) 设备剩余存储容量过低 (c) 累积缓存与新安装程序不兼容 — UPDATE-INSTALLATION-FAILURE-CACHE-STORAGE-NETWORK-TRIANGLE dimension distinct from PC-021 (Steam mobile auth/login network-blamed — 认证层) 和 PC-022 (Steam cross-region payment+cache+extension — 支付层) 因为 PC-023 是 UPDATE-INSTALLATION-FAILURE 模式 (缓存/存储/网络三角),玩家把设备存储或缓存损坏误归因为游戏/平台 bug (UPDATE-INSTALLATION-FAILURE-CACHE-STORAGE-NETWORK-TRIANGLE) (PC-023); AI-审计预发布 QA 方法论基线 2026 (sohu.com/a/1024939094_122066678 May 20 2026 — Firefox 团队借助 Claude Mythos Preview 在短短一个月内发现并修复 423 个安全漏洞,超过此前 15 个月总和;thehackernews.com June 6 2026 — depthfirst AI 在 FFmpeg 发现 21 个零日耗资约 1000 美元;thehackernews.com June 6 2026 — Chrome 149 单版修复 429 个 bug 含 AI 审计) — AI-AUDITED-PRE-RELEASE-QA-METHODOLOGY-ADOPTION-BASELINE dimension (元方法论) distinct from S-149 (Mozilla+Mythos 具体发现事件 — 单点事件) 和 S-190 (IBM X-Force 对 AI 攻击的第三方佐证 — 攻击面佐证) 和 S-204 (depthfirst FFmpeg 零日 — 单点发现) 因为 C-144 是 QA-METHODOLOGY-ADOPTION 维度:AI 辅助漏洞审计现在是 INDUSTRY-STANDARD 预发布 QA 关卡,GameZipper 应采纳 AI 辅助预发布审计作为标准流程 (AI-AUDITED-PRE-RELEASE-QA-METHODOLOGY-ADOPTION-BASELINE) (C-144).
**Review Cycle**: Every 4 hours (auto-update via Dynamic Test Intelligence)

- v1.7.0 (2026-06-07): 11 new test cases (R93 — Dynamic Test Intelligence cron) — Chrome Android WebGL UAF CVE-2026-9876, Android System WebView 146/147 visual corruption, WebKit 13-year-old memory invariant CVE-2026-43660 (iOS 26.5), Safari 26.5 20-WebKit-CVE cumulative patch, WebGPU cross-API Vulkan/DX12/Metal parity, Edge 149 4-week cadence, Windows DX12 shader compilation stall, DirectX 12 GPU validation layers, Android WebView memory pressure recovery, EU DSA Art. 28 dark-pattern prohibition, AI visual regression with Playwright toHaveScreenshot()

## Severity Definitions (per user policy 2026-06-06: 100% fix rate P0-P3)
- **P0 (Blocker)**: Website inaccessible, game fails to load, game crashes, unplayable
- **P1 (Critical)**: Core gameplay broken, level uncompletable, data errors, monetization broken
- **P2 (Major)**: Secondary function anomalies, UI display issues, poor experience
- **P3 (Minor)**: Text errors, choppy animations, unclear prompts, minor cosmetic

---

## CATEGORY 1: WEBSITE-LEVEL TESTING (apply to all pages)

### 1.1 Homepage (/)

- [W-002] **[P0]** All game cards render (no missing thumbnails, no broken images)
- [W-003] **[P0]** Click on game card navigates to correct /game-slug/ URL
- [W-004] **[P0]** Logo click returns to homepage
- [W-005] **[P0]** Category filter buttons (All, Puzzle, Arcade, Idle, Card, Match-3) work and filter correctly
- [W-006] **[P1]** NEW badge displays correctly on games marked isNew:true
- [W-007] **[P1]** No JS console errors on homepage (zero-tolerance policy)
- [W-008] **[P1]** gz-error-toast "Something went wrong" does NOT show on normal load
- [W-009] **[P1]** Games count matches /js/games-data.js GAMES array length
- [W-010] **[P2]** Browser forward/back buttons work correctly
- [W-011] **[P2]** 404 page renders for non-existent URLs
- [W-012] **[P2]** Mobile responsive (375×667, 414×896 portrait/landscape)
- [W-013] **[P3]** Infinite scroll loads more games smoothly
- [W-014] **[P3]** Search box filters games by name

### 1.2 Network Performance
- [W-020] **[P0]** Homepage total payload ≤ 2MB
- [W-021] **[P0]** No zombie/dead external script src (1ktower.com, alwingulla.com, rye.io, monetag.com direct)
- [W-022] **[P0]** No mixed-active-content (HTTPS page must not reference http://)
- [W-023] **[P1]** All external script srcs return 200 (not 405, 404, 501)
- [W-024] **[P1]** DNS resolution time < 500ms
- [W-025] **[P2]** Cloudflare CDN cache hit rate > 80%
- [W-026] **[P2]** gz-analytics.js localStorage archive works (gz_aa, gz_ab)

### 1.3 SEO & Meta
- [W-030] **[P1]** Each page has unique <title> tag
- [W-031] **[P1]** Each page has meta description
- [W-032] **[P2]** JSON-LD structured data validates (VideoGame schema)
- [W-033] **[P2]** og:image present and not 404
- [W-034] **[P3]** Canonical link present
- [W-035] **[P1]** Chrome 130+ Document Picture-in-Picture (PiP) — when user activates PiP on game page, gameplay canvas continues rendering and accepting input; no "page hidden → rAF pause" failure
- [W-036] **[P1]** Chrome Performance Personalization (Memory Saver / Energy Saver) — game must remain playable when browser throttles background tabs. Resource hints (preconnect/preload) should not break under memory pressure. Source: Chrome 130 release notes (https://developer.chrome.com/release-notes/130)

## CATEGORY 2: INDIVIDUAL GAME TESTING (per game)

  - `<div id="gz-ad-below-game">` (ad container)

  - `<script src="/game-footer.js" defer>` (related games)

- [G-004] **[P0]** No JS error on first load (network error, 404, 405, SyntaxError)

- [G-008] **[P1]** No site-analytics.gamezipper.com 1x1 pixel (HTTP 501)

- [P-014] **[P1]** Low-power mode (mobile): playable

## CATEGORY 6: INDUSTRY-SPECIFIC (2026 Q2 Research Findings)

### 6.1 Browser-Specific (Safari 26.4+)
- [B-001] **[P1]** IndexedDB works on Safari 26.4+ (was broken in iFrame)
- [B-002] **[P1]** GamePad API works with XBOX Cloud (fixed March 2026)
- [B-003] **[P2]** color-gamut P3 displays render correctly
- [B-004] **[P2]** prefers-color-scheme: dark mode handled
- [B-005] **[P0]** Chrome OOB GPU Write CVE-2026-9967 (pre-148.0.7778.216) — game.js using WebGL/WebGPU/Canvas2D must verify browser Chrome version ≥ 148.0.7778.216; failing build throws OOB GPU memory write. Source: https://stack.watch/browse/latest/
- [B-006] **[P0]** Chrome iOS Uninitialized Use CVE-2026-9963 (pre-148.0.7778.216) — Uninitialized Use allows RCE on game page. Any embedded iframe / WebGL context must run on patched Chrome. Source: https://stack.watch/browse/latest/
- [B-007] **[P1]** Safari 26.0 WebGPU enabled — games requesting `navigator.gpu` must not error on iOS 26+/iPadOS 26+ Safari 26.0; WebGL fallback path still required for pre-Safari 26 (Source: https://webkit.org/blog/17333/webkit-features-in-safari-26-0)
- [B-008] **[P2]** Safari 26.0 new CSS primitives (Anchor Positioning, Scroll-driven Animations, HDR images, SVG icons) — test rendering on iOS 26+/macOS 26+ Safari 26.0; fallbacks to static layout for older Safari

### 6.2 Web Platform 2026
- [W-100] **[P1]** WebGPU fallback to WebGL works
- [W-101] **[P1]** AV1/VP9 video decode if game has video
- [W-102] **[P2]** Hardware-accelerated video decode hint to user if disabled
- [W-103] **[P2]** Speculation Rules API for prerender (already used)
- [W-104] **[P3]** Back/forward cache (bfcache) restoration works

### 6.3 Player-Common Complaints (Industry Top Issues)
- [PC-001] **[P0]** No forced video ads that block gameplay (Poki complaint)
- [PC-002] **[P0]** No auto-redirect to other games during play (industry-wide complaint)
- [PC-003] **[P1]** Easy to find in school/work networks (no false-positive category filters)
- [PC-004] **[P1]** Doesn't slow on old Chromebooks/tablets
- [PC-005] **[P2]** Mute button discoverable
- [PC-006] **[P2]** Progress saved (no lost progress complaint)

- [PC-008] **[P3]** No fake "X" close button that opens new tab

## CATEGORY 7: ACCESSIBILITY (WCAG 2.2 + GDC 2026 GASIG)

### 7.1 Visual Accessibility
- [A-001] **[P1]** prefers-color-scheme: dark mode — listens to system theme change in real time (not just initial load); OS-level dark/light toggle updates page colors without page reload. Source: https://accessibilitychecker.org/blog/dark-mode-accessibility
- [A-002] **[P2]** WCAG 2.2 color contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for normal text, ≥ 3:1 for large text and UI components (buttons, score numbers, status text). Test on both light and dark backgrounds.

### 7.2 Motor & One-Hand UX (2026 mobile-first)
- [A-003] **[P1]** One-hand Thumb Zone: primary gameplay controls (move/shoot/jump/restart) and CTA buttons (Play Again, Next Level) are reachable within bottom 60% of viewport in portrait orientation on 375×667 / 414×896 phones. Source: https://novatechbeacon.com/latest/why-2026-gaming-is-built-for-one-hand-play

### 7.3 Cognitive & Screen Reader (GDC 2026 GASIG)
- [A-004] **[P2]** ARIA labels on canvas — game canvas has `role="application"` or `role="img"` + `aria-label="<Game Name>"` for screen readers (NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack). Source: https://igda-gasig.org/2026/04/01/gdc-2026-accessibility-roundtable

---

## CATEGORY 8: 2026-Q2 EMERGING THREATS (R89 — Dynamic Test Intelligence)

### 8.1 Browser Security CVEs (June 2026 disclosure wave)
- [B-009] **[P0]** Edge UXSS CVE-2026-45494 (CVSS 5.0, ZDI-26-330) — Microsoft Edge improper navigation event validation allows Universal XSS. Any game page with cross-origin iframes (e.g. embedded ad iframes, payment iframes) is exploitable on unpatched Edge. **Test**: confirm Edge ≥ 137.0.3296.93 with version check + verify X-Frame-Options / frame-ancestors CSP set to prevent UXSS amplification. Source: https://cyberpress.org/microsoft-edge-vulnerability
- [B-010] **[P0]** Edge Directory Traversal RCE CVE-2026-45495 (CVSS 7.5, ZDI-26-331) — Microsoft Edge cross-device managed sign-in path traversal enables RCE. **Test**: any game URL with Edge `ms-browser-extension://` or extension content must be on patched Edge. Source: https://www.zerodayinitiative.com/advisories/ZDI-26-331/
- [B-011] **[P0]** Chrome V8 Type Confusion CVE-2026-6363 (Chrome 147+ fix) — V8 JavaScript engine OOB memory write from type confusion, RCE on game page. **Test**: any game using JS-heavy animation (rAF, gameLoop, custom classes) must run on Chrome ≥ 147.0.7730.100 (or backport). Source: https://windowsforum.com/threads/cve-2026-6363-v8-type-confusion-chrome-147-fix-and-edge-patch-timeline.413791
- [B-012] **[P1]** Edge Origin Validation Bypass CVE-2026-45492 (CVSS 4.3, ZDI-26-329) — chainable with other vulns for RCE. **Test**: cross-origin POST endpoints on game pages must have CSRF token + SameSite=Strict cookies.

### 8.2 Safari 26.4 New Web Platform Features
- [B-013] **[P1]** Safari 26.4 WebTransport support (shipped) — low-latency UDP-based game server protocol available in iOS 26.4+/macOS 26.4+ Safari. **Test**: `if ('WebTransport' in window)` detection, fallback to WebSocket on older Safari. WebTransport unusable in iFrame per spec — must be top-level. Source: https://developmentstoday.com/news/safari-26-4-new-features-bug-fixes-2026
- [B-014] **[P2]** Safari 26.4 CSS Grid Lanes — magazine-style grid for game cards on homepage. **Test**: validate `display: grid; grid-template-columns: masonry;` fallback on pre-26.4 Safari. Source: https://developmentstoday.com/news/safari-26-4-new-features-bug-fixes-2026
- [B-015] **[P1]** Safari 26.4 Keyboard Lock API — fullscreen game can capture Escape/WASD without OS interruption. **Test**: request keyboard lock on game-start, gracefully release on blur/visibilitychange; desktop Safari only (no iOS).

### 8.3 Visual Bug Detection (AI-Assisted)
- [P-016] **[P1]** Canvas pixel-change assertion — automated visual regression test verifies canvas pixels change during game interaction (matches arXiv 2208.02335 methodology: 100% accuracy on 24 injected visual bugs vs 44.6% for traditional snapshot testing). **Test**: capture canvas pixels before + after 5s interaction, assert ≥ 0.5% pixel diff, then use vision_analyze to confirm semantic correctness. Source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.02335
- [P-017] **[P2]** Gameplay state diff (not just pixels) — text content + DOM state + score + level must all change during normal play. Pure pixel diff can false-positive on splash screens or pure background gradients.

### 8.4 Interop 2026 (Cross-Browser Convergence)
- [B-016] **[P2]** Interop 2026 baseline (Chrome/Firefox/Edge ≥ 98% baseline features, Safari 98%) — game must not depend on Safari/Edge divergence bugs. **Test**: identical gameplay verified across Chrome 149, Firefox 147, Edge 137, Safari 26.4. Source: https://howtogeek.com/chrome-firefox-edge-and-safari-are-teaming-up-to-fix-common-web-problems

### 8.5 Game Testing Methodology 2026 (SnoopGame / Sogeti / GDC)
- [PC-009] **[P2]** Shift-Right live playtesting — in-app feedback button on every game page (`?issue=1` query param) sends feedback to gz_aa localStorage archive. **Test**: feedback button visible on mobile, opens email/mailto with game slug pre-filled. Source: https://snoopgame.com/blog/top-game-testing-trends-to-watch-in-2026
- [PC-010] **[P2]** AI-driven QA smoke test — game should be playable in ≤ 60 seconds by an automated Playwright run (no tutorial wall, no forced login, no level select required).

---

## CATEGORY 9: PWA / OFFLINE / SERVICE WORKER

### 9.1 Service Worker Registration
- [PWA-001] **[P1]** No stale service worker blocks new game load — when a `sw.js` is updated, hard reload must show new content. **Test**: bump JS cache-bust version, hard reload, verify new version loads. GameZipper uses HTTP cache + meta refresh, not SW, so if SW is added in future, this is critical.
- [PWA-002] **[P2]** localStorage and IndexedDB persistence across page reload — high-score, level-progress, settings (mute, language) survive browser restart. **Test**: play game, set high-score, close tab, reopen, verify score persists. QuotaExceededError must be caught and UI must not crash.

---

## CATEGORY 10: 2026-Q2 LATE-EMERGING THREATS + NEW PLATFORM (R91 — Dynamic Test Intelligence)

### 10.1 Password Manager Clickjacking 2026 (DEF CON 33)
- [S-026] **[P0]** No clickjacking-style UI manipulation — game page must not use `opacity:0`, `pointer-events:none`, or invisible overlays on top of (or below) any element designed to trick users into clicking hidden targets. This includes: ad iframes, GAME BREAK overlay, splash-screen, cookie consent banner, recovery toast. **Test**: grep `gz-cb-overlay|gz-error-toast|splash-screen|cookie-consent` + audit computed style (must be `pointer-events:auto`, `visibility:visible`, `opacity>0` on clickable surfaces). Inspired by DEF CON 33 Marek Tóth disclosure showing 1Password, Bitwarden, LastPass, Enpass, iCloud Passwords, LogMeOnce all vulnerable to autofill data exfiltration. Source: https://dailysecurityreview.com/news/clickjacking-vulnerability-exposes-autofill-data-across-major-extensions
- [S-027] **[P0]** X-Frame-Options / CSP frame-ancestors enforced — no game page can be iframed by `attacker.com` for clickjacking. **Test**: `curl -sI https://gamezipper.com/GAME/` returns `X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN` OR CSP `frame-ancestors 'self'`. Without either, page is trivially iframe-wrapped for clickjacking amplification.

### 10.2 Chrome 149 + Password Manager CVE-2026-11084
- [B-017] **[P0]** Chrome 149+ required for production — Chrome 149 promoted to stable 2026-05 with 429 security patches (a record, including 22 critical + many use-after-free in untrusted input handling) + CVE-2026-11084 (Password Manager cross-origin data leak). **Test**: User-Agent Sniffing checks Chrome version ≥ 149.0.7827.53; out-of-date users get a banner suggesting update. GameZipper itself not directly vulnerable, but any embedded ad iframe using older Chrome puts user credentials at risk. Source: https://securityweek.com/chrome-149-patches-429-vulnerabilities + https://cvefeed.io/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11084

### 10.3 Safari 26.5 20 WebKit CVEs (CVE-2026-28905–28971) + WebRTC CVE-2026-28944
- [B-018] **[P0]** Safari 26.5+ required for production — 20 WebKit CVEs (memory corruption, OOB read, use-after-free) all fixed in Safari 26.5 / iOS 26.5 / iPadOS 26.5 / macOS Tahoe 26.5. **Test**: UA sniff Safari version ≥ 26.5; out-of-date iOS users shown update banner. CVE-2026-28947 is process crash via malicious web content. WebRTC CVE-2026-28944 patched in same release. Source: https://news.lavx.hu/article/safari-26-5-patches-20-webkit-flaws-and-a-webrtc-crash-bug-what-ios-ipados-and-macos-developers-need-to-know + https://cvefeed.io/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28847

### 10.4 Safari 26.5 New Web Platform Features
- [B-019] **[P1]** Safari 26.5 `:open` pseudo-class — game UI using `<details>`, `<select>`, `<dialog>`, or `<input>` (date/color picker) can style their open state via `select:open`, `details:open`, `dialog:open` with progressive enhancement (no-op on older browsers). **Test**: verify CSS like `select:open { border-color: skyblue }` applies when dropdown expands on Safari 26.5+. Source: https://webkit.org/blog/17938/webkit-features-for-safari-26-5
- [B-020] **[P1]** Safari 26.5 `Origin` API — `window.origin` now returns a structured `Origin` object (not just a string), with `.scheme`, `.host`, `.port` properties. **Test**: `if (window.origin && typeof window.origin === 'object' && 'host' in window.origin) { ... }` detection; fallback to `window.location.origin` string on pre-26.5 Safari. Source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/safari-release-notes/safari-26_5-release-notes
- [B-021] **[P1]** Safari 26.5 `ToggleEvent.source` — popover invoker attribution works. Game pages using popover-based menus/settings (e.g. "How to play" popover) can identify which button opened the popover. **Test**: bind popover via `popoverTargetElement` or `popovertarget` attribute, verify `toggleEvent.source` returns the invoker element. Source: https://webkit.org/blog/17938/webkit-features-for-safari-26-5

### 10.5 Chrome I/O 2026 — HTML-in-Canvas API
- [G-017] **[P1]** HTML-in-Canvas API accessibility — when a game uses WebGL/WebGPU/Canvas2D for rendering and embeds HTML UI inside the canvas (Chrome 149+ I/O 2026 feature), the HTML elements remain in the accessibility tree (NVDA/VoiceOver/TalkBack) and accept focus/keyboard input. **Test**: if any game adopts HTML-in-Canvas pattern, run Playwright `page.accessibility.snapshot()` to verify embedded HTML buttons are reachable. Fallback path required for pre-Chrome 149. Source: https://webgpu.com (Google I/O 2026 announcement by Thomas Nattestad)

### 10.6 Safari First-Draw Shader Stall (Unity WebGL pattern)
- [G-018] **[P1]** First-draw shader warmup — games using WebGL/Three.js/Babylon.js must pre-render (instantiate + draw at least one frame during splash) all major shader programs before gameplay starts. Safari's `webglPrepareUniformLocationsBeforeFirstDraw` is synchronous main-thread (~3ms per uniform lookup × 200 uniforms = ~3s freeze). **Test**: on iOS Safari, play any 3D game (e.g. stacker-3d, sushi-stack-3d) for 60s; record timeline; assert no >500ms main-thread stall in first 5s of gameplay. **Mitigation**: render all prefabs into an offscreen 1×1 canvas during splash. Source: https://richardfu.net/unity-webgl-safari-hang-shader-warmup (May 2026 post-mortem)

### 10.7 Origin API Tracking-Integrity
- [W-037] **[P2]** Origin API opt-in / fallback — analytics and auth code paths that check origin must handle both structured Origin object (Safari 26.5+) and string (legacy). **Test**: in any gz-analytics.js, gz_aa, gz_ab localStorage archive path, ensure `String(window.location.origin || (window.origin && window.origin.toString()) || 'unknown')` is the call pattern; no `window.origin.host` access without `typeof window.origin === 'object'` check. Source: https://webkit.org/blog/17938/webkit-features-for-safari-26-5

### 10.8 Chrome 149 429-Patch Record — Untrusted Input Validation
- [W-038] **[P1]** No untrusted-input handling that mirrors Chrome 149 CVE pattern — game-data.js / GAMES array entries come from a controlled build pipeline (no runtime user input), but any code that takes query string or localStorage and writes to innerHTML, eval, or `new Function()` is exposed. **Test**: `grep -rn "innerHTML\s*=\|eval(\|new Function(" js/ gamezipper.com/*/index.html | grep -v 'innerHTML = ""'` — must return only safe patterns. Source: https://pcworld.com/article/3158038/chrome-149-fixes-429-security-flaws-the-most-ever-in-one-update.html (majority of 429 patches are use-after-free / insufficient untrusted input validation)

---

## CATEGORY 11: 2026 LATE-Q2 USER SAFETY + PLATFORM (R92 — Dynamic Test Intelligence)

### 11.1 Fake Virus / Scam-Ad IAB Protection (2026 Player-Trust Issue)
- [S-028] **[P0]** No fake-system-alert creatives can hijack gameplay — Malwarebytes 2026-06 reports in-game ad creatives impersonating "Your device is infected!", "iCloud full", "8 viruses detected" scam popups that hijack to malicious lookalike app stores. **Test**: any in-ad iframe rendering on gz-ad-below-game / gz-cb-overlay / Monetag anti-adblock must be checked for the 6 scam-ad telltales: (a) "Click OK to install" CTA, (b) countdown timer with "device lockup in 2 minutes", (c) iOS/Android system-alert chrome spoof, (d) App Store / Play Store lookalike domain, (e) `display:none` parent over real iframe (forced click), (f) `window.opener` redirect to a non-monetag.com domain. GameZipper must sandbox iframe + use `referrerpolicy="no-referrer"` + Content-Security-Policy `frame-src https://*.monetag.com` to scope iframe source. Source: https://malwarebytes.com/blog/mobile/2026/06/fake-virus-alerts-are-invading-mobile-games
- [S-029] **[P0]** Ad iframe content is sandboxed with `sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"` (no `allow-top-navigation`, no `allow-popups`) — defense-in-depth against ad creative forcing parent navigation. **Test**: `grep -rE 'monetag|googlesyndication|adnxs|adsterra' gamezipper.com/*/index.html` shows ad containers; verify the injected `<iframe>` has `sandbox` attribute with no `allow-top-navigation`. Grep audit must show 0 ad-related `window.open` / `location.assign` / `window.top.location` calls in shipped JS. (Complements W-022 mixed-content, S-027 frame-ancestors, and S-026 clickjacking rules in v1.5.0.)

### 11.2 Chrome 149 = 429-Patch Record + 22 Critical (Forbes Confirmation)
